assertionResults.title: Cut List JSON Structure Passes to Export

steps.action: Run transcription + curation in assigned sandbox and inspect generated cut list JSON
steps.expected: Cut list contains source_file, start/end, description, and order per entry
steps.observed: Cut list `afa83236-a38f-4a34-97cc-dab7f7515138.json` created with 2 segments and all required keys per segment

steps.action: Run `snipsnap export --format edl <cut-list-id>` and check 1:1 event mapping
steps.expected: Export succeeds and output events map 1:1 to cut list entries
steps.observed: Export failed with `Error: Export module not available: No module named 'snipsnap.export.edl'` (exit 1), so 1:1 mapping could not be exercised

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by missing export module (`snipsnap.export.edl`) in current environment; export stage is unavailable for mapping validation.

assertionResults.title: Export All Three Formats From Same Cut List

steps.action: Use single cut list ID from curation and export to EDL/FCPXML/DaVinci
steps.expected: All three exports succeed and can be compared for equivalent clip order/timing
steps.observed: All three exports failed: EDL missing `snipsnap.export.edl`, FCPXML missing `snipsnap.export.fcpxml`, DaVinci missing `snipsnap.export.davinci` (all exit 1)

assertionResults.issues: Blocked because export modules for all three formats are unavailable, preventing file generation and cross-format timing/order comparison.

frictions.description: Curation discarded one candidate segment from clip3 due end timestamp slightly exceeding computed source duration (4.600 > 4.598), reducing cut list to 2 segments.
frictions.resolution: Continued with produced cut list ID and validated required cut list structure for available segments.

blockers.description: Export command cannot load format modules in this environment (`snipsnap.export.edl`, `snipsnap.export.fcpxml`, `snipsnap.export.davinci`).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried all three exports from the same cut list in the assigned sandbox; each failed with module-not-available error and no output files generated.

summary: Retested 2 assertions (VAL-CROSS-005, VAL-CROSS-011): both blocked. Curation and cut-list structure validation succeeded, but all export formats failed due missing export modules in the current environment.
